calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-26-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-26-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patrick Heard.
Plaintiff: Anwar Shaikh, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Gene Martin Bryman, and Defaulted Co-Defendant: william J. Nelson.
Exhibit 1 - Three-Day Notice dtd. 01-08-07------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 917 Folsom St., #319, San Francisco.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
No Damages, Fees or Costs requested.
Plaintiff stipulated for the return of Exhibit and to prepare Judgment.

11:30 A.M.
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
